programme.desc: Find out how a lost Air Force hero inspired his grandson to dream big.

programme.title: Haunted Discoveries: Family Spirits
programme.desc: Explore the mystical ability that helps a caregiver soothe departing souls.

programme.title: Haunted Discoveries: Family Spirits
programme.desc: Say hello to a mom who reaches out to her loved ones from beyond the grave.

programme.title: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: Meet families who are tormented by demons and aggressive ghosts after they move into their new homes.

programme.title: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: Hear about a woman who gets a good deal on an apartment but quickly finds out it was too good to be true. Then meet a young man who’s attacked by a spider-like demon when he’s left home alone.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): When Kids See Ghosts
programme.desc: See how families react when kids say they’ve seen a ghost.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): The Journey Back From Death
programme.desc: Hear from two people who’ve been to the other side and lived to tell the tale.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): My Dad's Ghost Saved My Mom's Life
programme.desc: Meet two women who receive ghostly messages that save their mothers’ lives.
programme.sub-title: My Dad's Ghost Saved My Mom's Life

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Invaders
programme.desc: With only three weeks left, the North Atlantic captains face more competition than ever as boats from all over head to Gloucester and battle for those last bluefin of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Thin Bluefin Line
programme.desc: There is a narrow margin separating the top four boats and only two weeks left in the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Final Fishdown
programme.desc: In the last week of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the closest race in Wicked Tuna history is a tossup among four top contenders.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Bite is On
programme.desc: Meet the fleet, as peak season begins and the adrenaline rush of \\"monstah\\" hunting hits Gloucester.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Payback's a Fish
programme.desc: After going bust on his last trip and coming home empty-handed, Marciano of Hard Merchandise now wrestles with the trials of being a husband and father who has to be away from home so often.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Tuna.com continues its winning streak, catching two fish in one day while the rest of the fleet struggles to even find a spot to fish in between the weekend recreational boaters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Size Matters
programme.desc: Meet Kevin and the Christina, a boat that gets its own real-life fish story when it snags an 1,100-pound \\"monstah\\" right out of the gate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Greed, Ego & Jealousy
programme.desc: After watching the Christina catch the biggest tuna of the season, the uber-competitive Captain Dave of the Tuna.com is obsessed with beating the record, and catching a fish bigger than 1,075 lbs!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm
programme.desc: Marciano, captain of Hard Merchandise, risks the elements to hook a giant bluefin and finds himself with boat trouble in the midst of the storm.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mutiny at Sea
programme.desc: A mixture of bad luck and mutiny brews in this tumultuous episode of Wicked Tuna. Tensions erupt on New England's top tuna boat, Tuna.Com, when Captain Dave and Paul get into a heated confrontation that causes Paul to quit!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Grudge Match
programme.desc: With just two weeks left until the end of tuna fishing season, Bounty Hunter gains a new deckhand.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Ralph in Not
programme.desc: A hard season with little money to show has taken its toll on the crew of the Odysea, leading Captain Ralph to lash out at his first mate Pirate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Good to the Last Bite
programme.desc: As the final week of tuna fishing begins, the Hard Merchandise, the Bounty Hunter, the Tuna.Com and the Odysea steam out together, each captain vowing to catch the biggest tuna before the season ends.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Bite is On
programme.desc: Meet the fleet, as peak season begins and the adrenaline rush of \\"monstah\\" hunting hits Gloucester.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Payback's a Fish
programme.desc: After going bust on his last trip and coming home empty-handed, Marciano of Hard Merchandise now wrestles with the trials of being a husband and father who has to be away from home so often.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Tuna.com continues its winning streak, catching two fish in one day while the rest of the fleet struggles to even find a spot to fish in between the weekend recreational boaters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Size Matters
programme.desc: Meet Kevin and the Christina, a boat that gets its own real-life fish story when it snags an 1,100-pound \\"monstah\\" right out of the gate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Greed, Ego & Jealousy
programme.desc: After watching the Christina catch the biggest tuna of the season, the uber-competitive Captain Dave of the Tuna.com is obsessed with beating the record, and catching a fish bigger than 1,075 lbs!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm
programme.desc: Marciano, captain of Hard Merchandise, risks the elements to hook a giant bluefin and finds himself with boat trouble in the midst of the storm.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Émilie Godest Case
programme.desc: On November 9th 2007, around 11:30PM, aid arrives on the scene of an accident at the exit of Chateney-en-France.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Victims of a Sadist - Cyril Koskinas Case
programme.desc: On July 19th 2004, the naked and tied up body of a woman is recovered in the Ourcq canal in Fresnes-sur-Marne. The victim is impossible to identify.
programme.sub-title: Victims of a Sadist - Cyril Koskinas Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)
programme.desc: On October 31, 2013, Belgian politician Bernard Ouessfal rushed down the six flights of a hotel in Ostend where he had met up with his wife, Véronique, the day before. He had found her unconscious in the bathroom with a mysterious plastic bag next to her
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Evelyne Boucher Case
programme.desc: On December 9th 1987, the naked body of the young Evelyne Boucher is found near Avignon. An unprecedented investigation begins making headlines.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Vale´rie Bary Case)
programme.desc: On Friday, March 26, 2004, in the region of Dijon, Laurent Bary came home from his work to discover the lifeless body of his wife, Valerie, bathing in a pool of blood.
programme.sub-title: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Vale´rie Bary Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)
programme.desc: Laetitia Perrais, 18, a trainee hotel waitress, vanishes after evening service.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.
programme.sub-title: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Jean-Jacques Le Page Case
programme.desc: On the morning of July 24th 2009, a fire erupts at house in Plougonvelin.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: A Cry for Help
programme.desc: Police patrolling the night streets hear gunshots and head to the scene. They find a nude middle-aged man in a parking lot lying face down in a puddle of blood.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Whispered Warnings
programme.desc: A woman fears the worst when her aunt stops answering her calls. When her greatest fear is confirmed, Dr. G must determine one thing: was this a fatal fall?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Fearing The Worst
programme.desc: Even with many leads, including an insulin overdose, a tooth infection, and chronic lupus, the pieces don’t add up in the case of a woman's death. Will Dr. G be able to uncover the truth?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Needle in the Haystack
programme.desc: Jeffrey Ortiz, a mentally challenged man with the mental capacity of a nine-year-old, is making himself a sandwich when he inexplicably falls, striking his head on the kitchen counter.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: In The Dead of The Night
programme.desc: A 71-year-old man wakes in the middle of the night, gasping for air. Paramedics rush to save him, but it’s all in vain: he’s dead by the time they arrive. What caused his death?
programme.sub-title: In The Dead of The Night

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Body Burn
programme.desc: A bipolar man's family fears he took his own life and turn to Dr. G for closure. At autopsy, Dr. G makes a shocking discovery that threatens to turn the whole case upside down.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Consequences
programme.desc: Ricky Hawthorne, a middle-aged man with a history of AIDS, arrives at his local hospital complaining of chest pains. Doctors perform extensive tests on him but find nothing wrong and release him.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: On a Texas highway, a fire is discovered having burnt three bodies beyond recognition. Dr. G finds bullets in the bodies and determines that they were all shot before being set on fire.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Nick Gage – The Lying Lothario
programme.desc: Fantasist Gage preyed on lonely women he would meet on dating sites.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homocidal Drifter
programme.desc: In the city of Moncton, New Brunswick police discover the bodies of Joan Hicks and her 11-year-old daughter, Nina ‚Äì both brutally murdered late in the night.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Casebook Rapist
programme.desc: An international student is found raped and murdered in the bathroom of her high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Victoria Day Shooter
programme.desc: On a single rain-soaked night during the Victoria Day weekend, police are called to the scene of three very similar crimes.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Bedroom Strangler
programme.desc: Women are being attacked in their beds at night. Police are baffled as to how this intruder is gaining access to apartments sometimes more than 15 stories up.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Lady-Killer
programme.desc: A hunter on the outskirts of Saskatoon, Saskatchewan stumbles across human remains.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Elusive Rapist
programme.desc: In the winter of 1968, the prairie city of Saskatoon is ravaged by a string of savage rapes.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Butcher of St. Ustache
programme.desc: Near Montreal, a husband comes home from work and finds his wife bound, gagged and shot in the head.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: On a rainy night in Edmonton, Alberta police are called to a remote trucking yard.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Murderous Mastermind
programme.desc: In downtown Edmonton, a prominent business owner is found shot to death in his business.

programme.title: NEW Moochie - Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: After the murder of Jill Halliburton, the police arrest a young black man nicknamed Moochie. However, the testimony of the victim's son raises many questions.

programme.title: NEW Moochie - Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Following Moochie's escape, the police organize a real manhunt. At the same time, the whole black community supports the fugitive.

programme.title: NEW Moochie - Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Crystal is arrested by the police and new charges are added to Moochie's file. These new elements cast doubt on his sincerity.

programme.title: NEW Moochie - Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: The defense investigation reveals inconsistencies in the testimony of Nan-Yao, the victim's husband. Did he lie to the police? Could he be guilty of his wife's murder?

programme.title: NEW Moochie - Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Moochie's trial begins. Even if the defense's role is not to solve the case, they will have to prove Moochie's innocence. Do they have enough evidence to do so?

programme.title: NEW Moochie - Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Following the cancellation of the first trial, the second begins. The defense seems to have changed its strategy. Will this new jury acquit Moochie?

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Jennifer Hudson
programme.desc: In 2008, Jennifer Hudson's mother and brother are fatally shot and her nephew is been abducted.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Dylan McDermott
programme.desc: Dylan McDermott seeks the truth 40 years after the in the 1967 death of his 20-year-old mother.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Allan Legere: The Monster of Miramichi
programme.desc: In 1989, the entire town of Miramichi is held hostage by a monster. A troubled man with a heinous past embarks on a 7-month crime spree, including brutal beatings, rape, arson and serial murder.
programme.sub-title: Allan Legere: The Monster of Miramichi

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: The chopper crew races to save a woman with a rare disease who's in danger of suffocating from uncontrollable muscle spasms; a badly burnt toddler at Cooks Beach needs an urgent airlift to hospital.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9
programme.desc: The chopper team is called out to save a pilot who's trapped in the wreck of his hang glider and a diabetic bus driver is found seriously ill after four days lying on his floor.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team are en route to the scene of a horrific accident. A pedestrian has been hit by a truck and is in a critical condition.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11
programme.desc: A woman is badly hurt after being knocked down a bank by her pet goat, a man is found with serious injuries on a remote beach, and 11-year old girl has fallen down a bank and suffered suspected spinal damage.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 12
programme.desc: The chopper team is called out to save a motorbike racer who's crashed at 200ks per hour and a woman scalded by an exploding radiator, plus an elderly golfer in a kilt suffers a heart attack on the 18th hole.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 13
programme.desc: A 39 year old man has crashed his bike 15 kilometres south of Auckland city and an elderly man has collapsed while walking. He is unable to speak properly and is incorreherent at Waiheke Island.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 chopper team struggle to save a Paeroa farmer.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 2
programme.desc: Tropical rain has hit Wellsford, flooding the entire town and leaving a pregnant woman and her unborn child fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 4
programme.desc: A Glenbrook farmer has been left seriously injured after one of his Highland cows has taken to him with its horns.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5
programme.desc: The team are being sent out to a traumatic accident that will end up being rather close to home.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 6
programme.desc: The Rescue chopper team is en route to Whitianga to help save a badly injured stock car driver.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 7
programme.desc: The chopper team are about to take off to rescue a seriously injured man.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: The chopper team is responding to a life threatening emergency.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9
programme.desc: The team have received a status 2 callout; Mark Lorimer was knocked out and has multiple injuries after being hit head-on by another vehicle.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: The team are called to a road accident where a woman has been cut from inside of her wrecked car.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11
programme.desc: The team is responding to a life-threatening emergency. A cyclist in his 60s, Terrence Williams, is unresponsive and critical after an accident 15 minutes flying time from Auckland, near the small settlement of Maramarua.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 12
programme.desc: The team are called out to a status 2 emergency; Clark Chamberlain was abseiling when he fell from the top of a cliff to the ground. He's now in a critical condition suffering from multiple injuries.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 chopper team struggles to save two young men who are feared drowned at Hahei; a Coromandel motorcyclist is struggling with punctured lungs, and young man is trapped inside a car after a high speed accident.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 2
programme.desc: A teenage motorcyclist is fighting for his life after crashing on a remote farm near Warkworth, a man has 2nd degree burns to his face and hands from an accidental explosion, and four men are missing after two boats capsized on the Kawhia bar.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team battles to save a man trapped in his overturned Land Rover on Rakino Island; a star rugby player at Onewhero may have broken his neck after a scrum collapsed, and a man out cycling on Waiheke is clinging to life after a cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5
programme.desc: The Westpac chopper crew attempt to save a Waiheke man who has life-threatening injuries after falling off a ladder and a motocross rider is in a bad way after a 100-foot jump goes badly wrong.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 6
programme.desc: The helicopter rescue crew responds to Pauanui to save a truck driver who's smashed through the windscreen after rolling his truck and a Port Charles family is distraught after a young girl is run over by a quad bike.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 7
programme.desc: The chopper crewmen have their hands full with five badly injured patients after a car crash near Waiuku, and a massive motorcycle pile-up leaves injured bikers all over the road, and a man may have broken his neck after falling from his horse.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: As a weather bomb hits, the chopper crew set out on one of the most challenging missions they have ever undertaken 20 miles off shore, a man lays face down at Muriwai beach unable to move.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9
programme.desc: A hang glider pilot may have broken his back after a heavy crash-landing, a Manaia man is in a bad way after coming off a sea biscuit at high speed, and a crashed Waikato driver needs an urgent air-lift to hospital to save his life.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: A motocross rider may have broken his back after hitting a tree head on at high speed, at a sawmill a man faces its worse nightmares; and a woman is fighting for her life after taking an accidental overdose of her husband's medication.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 2
programme.desc: The emergency bikers risk their own lives as they race to save and protect others. In Birmingham the biker paramedics are on the frontline as they deal with the aftermath of football violence.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Steve Harris finds himself under attack when he goes to the rescue of a teenager in a fight.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Trained to deal with anything, the biker paramedics find themselves dealing with a suspected stroke when a fishmonger collapses at market, a man’s hit crossing the road

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: There's a report of a stabbing for Birmingham's biker paramedics. In Essex, a driver tries to sweet talk his way out of trouble.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 7
programme.desc: New biker cop recruit PC Lucy Watson is on home turf in the seaside resort of Southend on Sea. From a suspect who does a runner to rowdy kids at night, she's got her hands full.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Biker paramedic Mark Hayes goes to the rescue of an RAF medic seriously ill on a platform at New Street Station and Steve Harris helps a pensioner who's had a nasty fall at market.

programme.title: Scorpion: Adaptation
programme.desc: While Team Scorpion works to stop an influx of drugs being smuggled into the country via drones, Walter gives Happy and Toby an ultimatum on their new relationship.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Fast & The Nerdiest
programme.desc: After Sylvester scores big on THE PRICE IS RIGHT, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a high-end car smuggling operation about to ship bioweapons to South America.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ticker
programme.desc: When Los Angeles' blood supply is hacked and deemed unusable because of fear it's been tainted, Team Scorpion must find the culprit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: While on a secret mission in Djibouti, Africa, with his new Homeland protege, Tim Armstrong (Scott Porter), Cabe is captured and Team Scorpion must save him.

programme.title: Scorpion: Twist And Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's mission to recover the remains of fallen Marines in Vietnam is threatened along with their lives when a deadly tornado heads directly towards them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is hired by the Department of Defense to break into Fort Knox and "steal" a precious artifact in order to test their security.

programme.title: Scorpion: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes to Chernobyl to repair the decaying nuclear reactor before a catastrophic meltdown.

programme.title: Scorpion: Toby Or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must out-think their unstable ex-Scorpion member after he kidnaps Toby and threatens to kill him unless his cunning demands are met.

programme.title: Scorpion: Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must put aside their personal and romantic predicaments when anonymous hackers with unknown motives take control of U.S. military aircraft and warships and point weapons at American cities.

programme.title: Scorpion: And More Civil War
programme.desc: Just as Team Scorpion makes headway against the hackers controlling U.S. naval destroyers, they learn that a U.S. nuclear submarine also has been hacked and has a missile about to launch.

programme.title: Scorpion: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: When Walter is accidentally launched into space in a rocket, he hallucinates about Paige as his oxygen runs low, and Team Scorpion works feverishly to find a way to bring him home before he suffocates.
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must find a boy from Ralph's class who goes missing on a field trip after he accidentally has a run-in with a deadly criminal. Also, Toby gets closer to finding out the identity of Happy's husband.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plight At The Museum
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's simple job at the Los Angeles Natural History Museum turns deadly when they discover thieves robbing a rare gem exhibit in order to get materials needed to enrich a nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Scorpion: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Before Halloween, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a deep, vast cave system in order to prevent a bat population from destroying the North America ecosystem.

programme.title: Scorpion: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: On Election Day, as democracy hangs in the balance, Team Scorpion is called on when someone tries to throw the U.S. presidential election into chaos.
programme.sub-title: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote

programme.title: Scorpion: Sly And The Family Stone
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion travels to Ireland for Megan's one-year memorial, Walter discovers that a nearby lake's natural disaster has created a poisonous cloud that could kill everyone in the village.

programme.title: Scorpion: Mother Load
programme.desc: Paige's estranged mother calls on Team Scorpion when she accidentally uncovers a forgotten nuclear reactor on the verge of exploding.

programme.title: Scorpion: This Is The Pits
programme.desc: Walter must swim through the deadly La Brea Tar Pits when Team Scorpion helps a woman trapped in the tar before she runs out of oxygen.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wreck The Halls
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Team Scorpion's electronics-free mountain getaway turns deadly when they come across gun-runners, and Ralph is kidnapped when they try to escape.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: When a mission in the desert results in exploding shrapnel that seriously wounds Cabe, Team Scorpion must freeze his body in order to save his life.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Fistful Of Energon
programme.desc: When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends. However, the Decepticons have other plans in mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: S.U.V.: Society Of Ultimate Villainy
programme.desc: Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard. However, he receives competition from Lockdown when Megatron offers a bounty on Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Autoboot Camp
programme.desc: The second-rate villains of Detroit team up to beat the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Black Friday
programme.desc: While chasing an Autobot traitor, Bumblebee thinks back on the time he spent with Bulkhead in the Autobot Boot Camp.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Sari, No One's Home
programme.desc: Unlikely matchups! It's Optimus Prime and Dinobot Grimlock vs. Blackarachnia and Meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Bridge Too Close, Part 1
programme.desc: Sari has to defend the Autobot home base from invading Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Bridge Too Close, Part 2
programme.desc: Megatron comes up with a plan to build a space bridge to Cybertron. However, he needs to capture Bulkhead, an expert space bridge mechanic, in order to build the bridge. Megatron's ultimate goal is to take over Cybertron and eventually the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transwarped, Part 1
programme.desc: The Final Battle! It's Optimus Prime and the Autobots against Megatron and the Decepticons in a fate to save both Earth and Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transwarped, Part 2
programme.desc: Sari Sumdac is coping with the newly discovered fact that she's a robot. Meanwhile, the Autobots on Earth are trying to figure out a way to warn the Autobots on Cybertron about the spy working for Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transwarped, Part 3
programme.desc: Things quickly descend from bad to worse for the Autobots when Detroit is menaced by new threats. Meanwhile, Ratchet remembers his first encounter with Omega Supreme and grows frustrated with his uselessness to the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Three's A Crowd
programme.desc: The Autobots are given a triple blow when one of their own is critically damaged, another is overloading destructively and the third has become an assault weapon for Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Where Is Thy Sting?
programme.desc: Bulkhead must face off against the Constructicons and their new leader, Dirt Boss, when they decide to hold the city's oil supply hostage. Meanwhile, the other Autobots manage to capture Lugnut, but find hauling him away a more difficult task.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Five Servos Of Doom
programme.desc: Unaware that he is being followed by the Elite Guard, Wasp heads to Earth to take his revenge on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Predacons Rising
programme.desc: When Sentinel Prime successfully captures fugitive Decepticons, Prowl becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Human Error, Part 1
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Elite Guard pursue Wasp for their own agenda. However, Blackarachnia has Swoop capture Wasp in her latest attempt to rid herself of her organic half. This experiment goes awry and turns Wasp into Waspinator.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Human Error, Part 2
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Optimus Prime patrols the city in search of Soundwave. With Porter C. Powell selling Soundwave action figures, Optimus is paranoid that the real Soundwave is out there.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Decepticon Air
programme.desc: It turns out that Soundwave has trapped the Autobots in a virtual reality. Now, Sari must free them before Soundwave completely turns them into Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: This Is Why I Hate Machines
programme.desc: In an effort to speed up their return to Cybertron, Sentinel Prime has Jazz pilot the Elite Guard ship through a space storm. The storm's energies reactivate Swindle, who frees his fellow Decepticon prisoners, and the group goes on to take over the ship.
programme.sub-title: This Is Why I Hate Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Endgame, Part 1
programme.desc: A TransWarp accident with the Space Bridge sends Ratchet and Captain Fanzone to Cybertron, where Sentinel Prime has the planet on high alert. They soon end up stumbling upon a plot by Shockwave to steal Omega Supreme's Access Codes from Arcee.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Endgame, Part 2
programme.desc: The Autobots discover Omega Supreme's energy signal on the Moon. Rachet insists on going there right away to save him, but Prime refuses, knowing that they are too weak to fight Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: First Encounter
programme.desc: During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Cons, mini-transformers who can be used as upgrades by their bigger brethren, crash lands on Earth. In present day, a group of children finds their ship by accident which brings the war to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: Escaping from the confrontation between Bots and Cons, Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons. Retreating to the moon, the 'Cons make the wreck of the Exodus there their base.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Base
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid, and get a condensed history of the conflict. Meanwhile, on the moon, Megatron plots to capture the minicons that are now appearing all over earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Comrade
programme.desc: The children join the Autobot team and head out on their first mission to find a newly waking minicon. The Decepticons arrive to combat them. Optimus Prime finds his old minicon partner.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Soldier
programme.desc: The next minicon alert is from Antarctica. Starscream retrieves the minicon, but has it stolen from him. Hot Shot learns a lesson in cooperation.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Jungle
programme.desc: The newest minicon activates in the middle of a forest: both sides fight for it, and the conflict sets the trees alight. The Autobots attempt to battle the blaze, while Starscream finally acquires his own minicon.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Carnival
programme.desc: Rad and Carlos smuggle their minicons out of the base to visit the town's carnival. Billy and Fred see them transform and try to capture one, but are thwarted by Hot Shot.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Palace
programme.desc: In an ancient palace deep beneath the Sahara another minicon is waking, but who will reach it first - the children or the Decepticon Demolishor?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Confrontation
programme.desc: The Decepticons capture all the children to use as hostages in exchange for the Autobots's minicons. Fred and Billy are officially introduced to the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Underground
programme.desc: The latest minicon re-activates in the subway system of a large city, and there's the usual scramble to see which side can get to it first. And a new transformer makes himself known - but which side is he on?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Ruin
programme.desc: From an ancient submerged city a beautiful girl issues a warning about the devastating power - and danger - of three special, combining minicons. The Autobots already have two of them: now Megatron aims to capture the third.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Prehistory
programme.desc: The children learn more about the history of the minicons and the war. The latest minicon alert leads the team to a volcanic island: the volcano erupts in the middle of the usual 'Bot vs 'Con battle.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Swoop
programme.desc: he Decepticons gain access to the Autobot base, and attempt to take the other two minicons that, with the one Megatron captured on the island, combine to make the supremely powerful Star Sabre. Can Hot Shot save the day?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Overmatch
programme.desc: Hot Shot proves himself very skilled with the Star Sabre, but the arrival of a new Decepticon proves him overconfident. The Decepticons acquire the first of another three combining minicons which transform into the ultimate form of defence.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Gale
programme.desc: A new minicon activates inside a highway tunnel, and the race is on to see who reach it first. Hot Shot is becoming more proficient with the Star Sabre. A new transformer arrives, claiming to be an Autobot, but Rad has his doubts.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Credulous
programme.desc: Grabbing onto Megatron at the end of a battle, Hot Shot and Sideways are transported to the moon. The battle resumes, but Hot Shot is betrayed, and Starscream gains the Star Sabre.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Conspiracy
programme.desc: With the loss of the Star Sabre, the Autobots keep losing battles. In a fog-bound valley, Megatron plots to get the Sabre from Starscream, at the same time boosting his crew's confidence in himself. Scavenger's secret is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Trust
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons face off amongst snowy mountains in the battle for the latest minicon. Despite using the Star Sabre, this time Megatron loses - and Scavenger finally gains the Autobots' trust.

programme.title: Attack And Defend

programme.title: Africa's Wild Horizons

programme.desc: Cozumel is home to coral, fish, turquoise seas-and mysterious underwater caves.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild

programme.title: Africa's Claws & Jaws

programme.desc: Witness the deadly hunting techniques of nature’s specialized killing machines.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In October 2003, the San Diego County community was shaken by a tragic discovery: the dismembered legs of a woman were found in a dumpster.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1985, student Terri McAdams was beaten and killed by an intruder who entered the flat she was staying in. In 2024, genetic genealogy finally caught Terri's killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In March 2003, a lorry driver was found dead behind the wheel in Camberley, England. Police gambled on the revolutionary technique of familial DNA analysis.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976, a woman was left for dead in her home in southern California. Despite a major manhunt, the violent killer avoided detection for over four decades.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: On Valentines' Day 2007, police in Southern California were called to a particularly violent murder scene. Advances in forensic genealogy finally solved the case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 2018, two paralegals were shot dead whilst at work in Scottsdale, Arizona. Four more victims were linked to the killing - who was the serial killer?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1984, a young woman's body was discovered in a lane close to her home in Bath, England. Investigating how police eventually track down the perpetrator of the heinous attack.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: After being reported missing, a young couple's bodies were discovered more than sixty miles apart. Looking at how the dedicated investigators eventually find the killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1979, two young boys came home from school to find their mother's dead body in the living room. Investigating how the investigators track down the killer with no solid leads.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a young woman is found beaten to death in Wisconsin in 1984, the killer evades detection for decades. How did a revolutionary DNA method reveal his identity?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a beloved local teacher is brutally attacked in her Pennsylvania home, her death shocks the community. After 27 years, dedicated investigators trace her killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1973, two schoolgirls are found murdered in the Welsh village of Llandarcy. The killer's identity remains a mystery until 2002.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1982, a woman is found shot to death near Lake Tahoe. 37 years later, a ground-breaking technology helps identify both the victim and the killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1988, police discover the mutilated body of Lynette White. 25 years later, a ground-breaking DNA technique finally leads detectives to the killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1994, 42-year-old Le Bich-Thuy is found dead next to her home. Decades later, DNA and genealogy technology allow detectives to track down the killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 69-year-old Evelynne Derricott is found brutally murdered in 2011. After the case goes cold, new DNA technology eventually leads detectives to the truth.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1986, a teenage girl is on her way to the shop when she is attacked and sexually assaulted. Decades later, new DNA technology reveals the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Exploring how an extensive investigation and revolutionary science of familial DNA revealed an attacker's identity.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In Colorado in 1996, a young woman's body was found in an alley. After the case goes cold, advancements in genetic technology lead police to the killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 2001, a student is attacked in Williamsburg, Virginia and months later the attacker strikes again. Finally, new DNA technology reveals the perpetrator.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: In the wake of a targeted attack on the officers of 15 Division (ep. 412), Andy, Swarek, and their fellow officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw – in time to save his life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case their way, 15 Division will have decide whether to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy’s ideas about what makes a perfect family are put into perspective when she meets an out-of-control teen who needs to be protected from her own conservative family.

programme.title: Chef
programme.desc: A chef (Jon Favreau) quits his job at a prestigious Los Angeles restaurant and starts a food-truck business in Miami with his ex-wife (Sofía Vergara), his best friend (John Leguizamo) and his son.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After snitching on the mob, a Mafia boss (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a sleepy town in France, but their insistence on resorting to their old habits places them in danger from vengeful cronies.

programme.title: The Spirit
programme.desc: A ghostlike crime fighter (Gabriel Macht) faces a villain known as the Octopus (Samuel L. Jackson), whose aim is to destroy Central City while searching for the secret to immortality.

programme.title: Sin City: A Dame to Kill For
programme.desc: In the central story, Dwight McCarthy (Josh Brolin) struggles with his inner demons and tries to maintain control until his former lover, Ava Lord (Eva Green), returns wanting his help to escape her abusive husband.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After snitching on the mob, a Mafia boss (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a sleepy town in France, but their insistence on resorting to their old habits places them in danger from vengeful cronies.

programme.title: The Spirit
programme.desc: A ghostlike crime fighter (Gabriel Macht) faces a villain known as the Octopus (Samuel L. Jackson), whose aim is to destroy Central City while searching for the secret to immortality.

programme.title: Sin City: A Dame to Kill For
programme.desc: In the central story, Dwight McCarthy (Josh Brolin) struggles with his inner demons and tries to maintain control until his former lover, Ava Lord (Eva Green), returns wanting his help to escape her abusive husband.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After snitching on the mob, a Mafia boss (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a sleepy town in France, but their insistence on resorting to their old habits places them in danger from vengeful cronies.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A man (James Wilder) finds himself in what seems to be a refuge in a post-apocalyptic world, lorded over by a sadistic industrialist (M. Emmet Walsh) who pits his guests against one another for enjoyment...but all is not what it seems to be.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Howie (Neil Patrick Harris), a boy with intellectual disabilities, is the last unaffected person in a town overrun by a strange, parasitic madness. On his own for the first time, Howie has only himself to rely upon if he wants to save his sister!

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: After a friend's betrayal cost him his Army career, Lee Taylor (Costas Mandylor) helps a self-styled militia Major hijack an Army shipment. Expecting missiles, they find a mysterious cargo and a lone Army Guard who warns of its deadly capability.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Convicted of a murder he didn't commit, Linden Stiles can either accept execution or become the subject of a military experiment. Choosing to live, he finds himself slowly dehumanized by the alien DNA that has been injected into him.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: With Earth under alien rule, humanity has been programmed into slavery. A band of rebels kidnaps Evan (Erich Anderson), one of the alien leader's slaves. After a twist of fate, Evan agrees to assassinate his former master...with devastating results.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When three young women age and die within hours, a small town is turned upside down. How does Helen (Maxine Miller), a doctor's aging mother, play into these deaths? The answer to the puzzling mystery of fragile youth is soon to be revealed.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: On a desperate mission to survive, a young military cadet (Will Wheaton) learns the difference between heroic ideals and the bitter realities of war as he and his dying comrades prepare a strike against the aliens who may have condemned them to death.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: What really happens during an out-of-body experience? Scientist Rebecca (Peri Gilpin) is so desperate to find out that she decides run an experiment on herself. But not everyone is happy with the lengths science will go to for empirical proof.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Inventor Dr. Jack Henson (David Hyde Pierce) comes up with a virtual prison where criminals serve a life sentence in just a few, cost-efficient hours. When an innocent man's life is at stake, the doctor must submit himself to his own invention.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A mentally challenged man (Howie Mandel) is made more intelligent by a machine that transfers people's memories and experiences into his head, but kills its victims. And he soon discovers that the mind can be a minefield in The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: After a couple's son dies, an experimental procedure harvests the boy's nerve cells, allowing the mother to give birth to a genetically identical child. But soon it becomes clear that this fetus is not just identical…it is actually Justin himself.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A man's family is turned upside down when he discovers that his son's college sweetheart is the same woman he rescued from a secret military experiment twenty years before...only she has not aged a day since. Peter Onorati and Fred Savage star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When the Stream -- an artificial system providing information to all society members through computer chips implanted in their brains -- begins to malfunction, an unlikely, primitive man (George Newbern) may be mankind's only hope.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: After a chemical war renders the world's population unable to conceive healthy children, a mother and father must escape from a sinister government agency intent on using their miraculously healthy newborn to repopulate the species.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: In a society imprisoned for generations by extraterrestrials who invaded Earth, an electronics expert (Harley Jane Kozak) discovers that not only are her human jailers really machines, but they also have been holding prisoners for nearly a century.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A preacher descends upon the 18th-century town of Heart's Desire and offers to share his extraordinary powers with four outlaws. But who is this stranger and why has he given these outlaws such deadly powers? Caspar Van Dien and Esai Morales star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Attempting to deliver serum to a plague-stricken planet, a pilot (Eric McCormack) and his crew crash land on an unknown moon. Bitten by an alien spider while fixing the ship, the pilot's mind wanders between alternate realities…in The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A woman unable to feel emotions gets a new lease on life when a brain implant allows her to experience feelings for the first time. But, when the implant malfunctions, driving her towards insanity, she is shocked at the real cause of her problems.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A remorseless, uncaring scientist (Stephen Lang) and his partner (Michael Ontkean) discover a way to bring life back to the recently deceased. But after the scientist is killed and brought back to life himself, will he choose to live differently?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Brilliant geneticist Martin Nodel (Ron Rifkin) unlocks a secret code imprinted on human DNA. But when he tests this code on himself, his instincts draw him to a remote location where he finds a trip…to The Outer Limits. Ryan Reynolds co-stars.

programme.title: Aliens In USSR
programme.desc: Unsolved Soviet Union Alien Mysteries: Dyatlov Pass incident, Petrozavodsk miracle, Voronezh case. Amaze and frighten, but doubt of alien involvement.

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: The Hidden Truth
programme.desc: This documentary charts the US government's involvement with UFO phenomenon from 1947 to the present day. Featuring rare classified footage, expert interviews, cover-ups and the revelation of a secret 20 million dollar UFO research program.

programme.title: Dulce Base: The New Illuminati
programme.desc: Dulce, New Mexico is a hotspot for mysterious phenomena and alleged secret military collaboration between humans and aliens.

programme.title: Alien Crash at Roswell
programme.desc: The most enigmatic UFO incident in history exposed. Join Philip Coppens, star of History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series in this and unprecedented expose on the Roswell Incident revealing that there is much more to this case than previously believed.

programme.title: Linda Napolitano: The Alien Abduction of the Century
programme.desc: Linda Napolitano's 1989 alien abduction is the abduction case of the century.

programme.title: Crop Circle Realities
programme.desc: Exploring over a thousand crop circles worldwide, this documentary uncovers stunning designs and a possible extraterrestrial link—revealing hidden truths and realities behind one of the most mysterious UFO phenomena on Earth.

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: On April 19, 1897, the Dallas Morning News reported a mysterious airship had crashed into a windmill in the nearby town of Aurora, Texas.

programme.title: Alien Contact: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago a special, genetically advanced race of beings came to Earth. They were seen as Gods by primitive man and worshipped. They set themselves apart.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: There are locations all over the globe -- like the Bermuda Triangle -- where the Earth's energies result in a preponderance of mysterious activity.

programme.title: UAP: Death of the UFO
programme.desc: When Project Blue Book was terminated, the military vowed that they were no longer investigating the phenomena. However it was revealed that the Pentagon was conducting a program on UFOs and UAPs.

programme.title: Alien Signs: The Message
programme.desc: Colin Andrews, a leading authority on crop circles, investigates the mysterious phenomenon that has intrigued people for decades.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III: Turtles In Time
programme.desc: When April O'Neil discovers an ancient sceptre with magical powers, the turtles must cow-a-bunga their way back to 17th century Japan to rescue her.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: In this live-action movie feature, Shredder has returned to cause more mayhem by kidnapping the rat Ninja Master. But the Turtles have been armed with Professor Perry's antidote and, with the help of a journalist, set out to save the Ninja Master.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Turtles are up to their shells in trouble in the second full-length original movie when a canister of toxic ooze falls into the hands of the Shredder!

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: There's real Yorkshire drama when Derek auctions off some vehicles that were used in the TV show Heartbeat. There's love for an Austin Cambridge and sporty Italian number finds a new home.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to West Yorkshire to collect a rare 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car that is expected to sell for more than a few coppers.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Scotland during a large rainstorm to pick up a Jaguar E-type and a rare MGC convertible, meanwhile Dave extracts a rare Austin Gipsey from a lock up.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Live
programme.desc: Highlights of a special event featuring an in-person auction. Derek and Dave aim to get the right price for a 1958 Jaguar XK 150, and there's a bidding war for a 1975 Yamaha Fizzy.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A beautiful looking sports car has been fooling the punters and intriguing Derek. It's a Challenger E-Type, a fibreglass replica created from an E-Type mould.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A near-perfect 50s Chevy panel van and a very desirable low-mileage 80s Brooklands Capri tempt auctioneer Derek out of Yorkshire.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Four VW camper vans pitch up at the auction house looking for a new home and Derek picks up an Austin 16 that goes like stink and has some unusual modern modifications.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim and Siddy head to Dover Street, now known as Green Park. During the Second World War, the abandoned passageways and lift shafts of the original station had an incredible second life as the base for the London Passenger Transport Board.

programme.title: Nurses on the Ward

programme.desc: As Halloween approaches, Matron Hazera has a staffing nightmare, ED Matron Steph meets an abusive patient in police custody, and Amy helps deliver premature identical twins via c-section.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A popular, healthy, 60-year-old woman suffered a sudden, painful death. Detectives managed to trace the killer, despite their calculated and elaborate web of deceit.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who stalked and gained his victim's trust, enticed her to her death. Almost two decades later scientific advances brought the perpetrator to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A man returning from a family visit stops to help what appears to be a stranded group on the Belt Parkway in Brooklyn, NY. Half an hour later, he is found dead.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Laura Garza told friends she was going on a night out at the Marquee Club. When she didn't show for work the next day a search ensued to find her as well as the men she left with.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of Shelby Weatherly, and how the police caught her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation to catch a serial rapist and how advanced DNA technology finally tracked him down.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a double-homicide and how dedicated police work, alongside forensics, solved the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: How investigators uncovered what happened in the moments leading up to the death of Jchandra Brown.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When David Castor was found dead, an extensive police investigation - fuelled with the power of forensics and toxicology - uncovered another victim.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 22nd December 1979, Phyllis Murphy disappears after doing some Christmas shopping. When she doesn't come home, her family fear the worst, but it's not until a month later in the Wicklow Mountains that her body is discovered.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 31st July 2003, a woman was reported missing after she hadn't been seen or heard from in over a week. Police suspected foul play and after an intensified search, they tracked down her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 28th February 2001, the body of a woman was found at the bottom of the stairs of her home in North Dublin, Ireland. What initially looked like an accident, soon turned into a murder investigation.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In March 2007, Shamaia Smith failed to return from work in East Hartford, Connecticut. After a few days she was reported missing. An investigation was launched but it became clear she was probably dead.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In January 1992, when an estate agent went missing, both police and her family feared the worst. For 25-year-old Stephanie Slater, it was the start of an 8 day ordeal defined by torture and terror.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: December 1986: Helle Craft was reported missing. Police questioned her husband, he claimed she was visiting her mum. From interviews with loved ones it became apparent something sinister had happened.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 17th September 2006, emergency services were called to a blaze in Pinyon Pines. A house was engulfed in flames and three burned bodies were discovered inside. It soon became clear this was no accident.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The death of an innocent mother and how detectives identified her killer and proved his guilt.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: An innocent victim was lured to his death and cutting edge forensics helped to find the killer.
